metadata.description: German federal budget intelligence skills powered by the bundeshaushalt-cli (bundeshaushalt.de budget-data portal)

plugins.name: bundeshaushalt
plugins.description: Break the German federal budget down by ministry, economic group or function, compare planned vs. realised (Soll/Ist) figures, and build multi-year spending trends — all over the open, key-free bundeshaushalt.de portal via the bundeshaushalt-cli.
